gito_review.note: Branch accumulates changes from multiple specs (SOLID refactor, tests, docs, configs). This context only covers high-arity-refactoring (3 dataclass wraps + dead kwargs + pragma audit). Issues from other specs are marked FALSE_POSITIVE.

issues.title: Removed TypeScript ESLint recommended rules break linting coverage
issues.reasoning: Unrelated to high-arity-refactoring. TS ESLint config changes from other spec merges.

issues.title: Misplaced [Unreleased] section
issues.reasoning: Unrelated documentation issue from other spec merges.

issues.title: Typo in referenced documentation filename
issues.reasoning: Pre-existing typo in global config, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: Broken Markdown Table Header Syntax
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: Missing Phase 7 and Broken Phase Numbering
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: Inconsistent Terminology: IA vs AI
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: Conflicting Phase Count References
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: Regression: Trip day selection logic removed, breaking pre-selection in edit form
issues.reasoning: GITO HAS IT BACKWARDS — our branch FIXED this bug. The diff shows we ADDED .value=${dayValue} binding and selected attributes that were previously missing. The 'removed' logic gito complains about was already absent in main; we added it back. This is a fix, not a regression.

issues.title: Inconsistent translation key removal vs provided file state
issues.reasoning: Our branch only added new translation keys (t_base, soh_sensor), didn't remove any. The 'inconsistent removal' is from other spec merges.

issues.title: English word used in Spanish translation
issues.reasoning: Pre-existing translation issue, not introduced by high-arity spec.

issues.title: Locale-dependent day name extraction in is_trip_today causes incorrect trip matching
issues.reasoning: Our branch refactored generate_trip_id into helper functions but did not change is_trip_today. Locale issue is pre-existing.

issues.title: Type hint mismatch in generate_trip_id excludes supported trip_type
issues.reasoning: Our branch intentionally added 'punctual' as an additional accepted Literal value alongside 'recurrente' and 'puntual'. This is intentional to match the API that accepts both spellings. Not a bug.

issues.title: Contradiction regarding dashboard removal
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

issues.title: High LOC counts contradict 'clean separation of concerns' claims
issues.reasoning: Documentation file, unrelated to high-arity spec.

gito_review.verdict: All 14 gito issues are FALSE POSITIVES relative to high-arity-refactoring. The branch contains accumulated changes from multiple specs (SOLID refactor, test additions, docs, configs). None of the flagged issues relate to the 3 dataclass wraps (ChargingWindowPureParams, WindowStartParams, PopulateProfileParams), dead kwargs removal, pragma audit, or qg-accepted cleanup that constitute this spec.
